majorTuition.zh: 香港大学本科学费约HK$182,000/年（约$23,333），各专业学费基本统一。
majorTuition.en: University of Hong Kong (HKU) tuition ~HK$182,000/yr (~$23,333). Uniform across programs.

desc.zh: 香港大学是亚洲最具声望的大学之一，医学和法学全球领先。全英文教学，国际化程度极高。百年老校，校友网络强大。
desc.en: HKU is one of Asia's most prestigious universities with globally leading medicine and law. Fully English-taught, highly internationalized with a powerful alumni network.

requirements.IB:
各专业IB要求不同：
• Arts 文学：33-34
• Science 理学：33-35
• Engineering 工程：33-36
• Business & Economics 商学/经济：36-38
• Architecture 建筑：34
• Law 法学：40-42
• Medicine 医学：42-44
• Social Sciences 社科：33-35

deadline.zh: 1月-4月（因校而异），部分有Early Round 11月
deadline.en: Jan-Apr (varies), some have Early Round in Nov

safetyDetail.zh: 香港整体治安良好，校园安全有保障。公共交通便利，夜间安全度高。
safetyDetail.en: Hong Kong has good overall safety. Campus security is reliable. Convenient public transport, safe at night.

climate.zh: 亚热带气候，夏季炎热潮湿，冬季温和
climate.en: Subtropical, hot humid summers, mild winters

visa.zh: 学生签证 → 毕业后IANG签证（1年，可续签）→ 在港居住满7年可申请永久居民。香港身份含金量高，免签170+国家。
visa.en: Student visa → IANG visa (1 year, renewable) → Permanent residency after 7 years in HK. HK passport offers visa-free access to 170+ countries.

housing.zh: 大部分学校大一保证校内宿舍。校内约HK$15,000-25,000/年。校外租房较贵（HK$5,000-8,000/月合租）。
housing.en: Most universities guarantee first-year housing. On-campus ~HK$15,000-25,000/yr. Off-campus expensive (~HK$5,000-8,000/month shared).

graduationRate.zh: 毕业率优秀。香港大学本科通常4年制。
graduationRate.en: Excellent graduation rates. HK undergraduate programs are typically 4 years.

employment.zh: 香港作为国际金融中心，金融、法律、商业就业机会极多。大湾区发展提供更多选择。
employment.en: As an international financial center, HK offers abundant jobs in finance, law, and business. Greater Bay Area development provides more options.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 学校提供医疗保险计划。校内有University Health Service。香港公立医院急诊HK$180。可购买额外商业保险约HK$1,500-3,000/年。
healthcare.en: ✅ University health insurance available. On-campus Health Service. Public hospital ER fee HK$180. Optional commercial insurance ~HK$1,500-3,000/yr.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接向学校申请（各校独立系统）
📅 截止日期：1月-4月（因校而异）
💰 申请费：HK$300-450
📝 所需材料：IB/A-Level/高考/SAT成绩、英语成绩、个人陈述、推荐信
💡 内地生通过高考统招或自主招生两种途径
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly to each university
📅 Deadline: Jan-Apr (varies)
💰 Fee: HK$300-450
📝 Required: IB/A-Level/Gaokao/SAT, English proficiency, personal statement, references
💡 Mainland students: Gaokao or independent admission

majorTuition.zh: 香港中文大学本科学费约HK$145,000/年（约$18,589），各专业学费基本统一。
majorTuition.en: Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK) tuition ~HK$145,000/yr (~$18,589). Uniform across programs.

desc.zh: 港中大以双语教育闻名，商学院亚洲顶尖（AACSB认证）。校园依山傍水，是香港最大最美的大学校园。书院制度独特。
desc.en: CUHK is famous for bilingual education with a top Asian business school (AACSB). Largest and most beautiful campus in HK, built on hills. Unique college system.

requirements.IB:
各专业IB要求不同：
• Arts 文学：30-33
• Business Administration 工商管理：35-37
• Engineering 工程：33-35
• Science 理学：32-34
• Medicine 医学：40-42
• Computer Science 计算机：34-36
• Translation 翻译：33-35
• Social Science 社科：32-34

deadline.zh: 1月-4月（因校而异），部分有Early Round 11月
deadline.en: Jan-Apr (varies), some have Early Round in Nov

safetyDetail.en: Hong Kong has good overall safety. Campus security is reliable. Convenient public transport, safe at night.

climate.en: Subtropical, hot humid summers, mild winters

📋 申请平台：直接向学校申请（各校独立系统）
📅 截止日期：1月-4月（因校而异）
💰 申请费：HK$300-450
📝 所需材料：IB/A-Level/高考/SAT成绩、英语成绩、个人陈述、推荐信
💡 内地生通过高考统招或自主招生两种途径

💰 Fee: HK$300-450
📝 Required: IB/A-Level/Gaokao/SAT, English proficiency, personal statement, references
💡 Mainland students: Gaokao or independent admission

majorTuition.zh: 香港科技大学本科学费约HK$155,000/年（约$19,871），各专业学费基本统一。

desc.zh: 港科大成立仅30余年即跻身世界顶尖，商学院全球Top 10。以创新和创业精神著称，被誉为亚洲MIT。
desc.en: HKUST reached world-class status in just 30+ years. Business school ranked global top 10. Known as the MIT of Asia for its innovation and entrepreneurship.

各专业IB要求不同：
• Science 理学：33-35
• Engineering 工程：33-36
• Business & Management 商学：36-38
• Computer Science 计算机：36-38
• Quantitative Finance 量化金融：38-40
• Interdisciplinary Programs 跨学科：34-36

deadline.zh: 1月-4月（因校而异），部分有Early Round 11月

majorTuition.zh: 香港理工大学本科学费约HK$145,000/年（约$18,589），各专业学费基本统一。
majorTuition.en: Hong Kong Polytechnic University (PolyU) tuition ~HK$145,000/yr (~$18,589). Uniform across programs.

desc.zh: 港理工的酒店管理全球第一，设计学院和工程学院实力强劲。注重实用性和行业联系。参与了中国航天项目。
desc.en: PolyU's hospitality management is ranked #1 globally. Strong design and engineering. Focuses on industry connections. Contributed to China's space missions.

• Computing 计算机：30-33
• Engineering 工程：28-32
• Design 设计：30-33
• Hotel Management 酒店管理：30-33
• Nursing 护理：28-30
• Construction 建筑：28-30

majorTuition.zh: 香港城市大学本科学费约HK$145,000/年（约$18,589），各专业学费基本统一。
majorTuition.en: City University of Hong Kong (CityU) tuition ~HK$145,000/yr (~$18,589). Uniform across programs.

desc.zh: 城大近年排名上升迅速，商学院获AACSB和EQUIS双认证。拥有全港唯一的兽医学院。位于九龙塘，交通便利。
desc.en: CityU has risen rapidly in rankings. Business school holds AACSB and EQUIS. Home to HK's only veterinary school. Conveniently located in Kowloon Tong.

各专业IB要求不同：
• Business 商学：28-32
• Engineering 工程：28-31
• Computing 计算机：30-33
• Media 传媒：29-32
• Law 法学：34-36
• Veterinary Medicine 兽医：34-36
• Science 理学：28-30

majorTuition.zh: 香港浸会大学本科学费约HK$140,000/年（约$17,948），各专业学费基本统一。
majorTuition.en: Hong Kong Baptist University (HKBU) tuition ~HK$140,000/yr (~$17,948). Uniform across programs.

desc.zh: 浸大传理学院是亚洲最好的新闻传播学院之一。中医药学院是香港唯一获政府资助的中医学院。视觉艺术也很强。
desc.en: HKBU's School of Communication is one of Asia's best for journalism. Its Chinese Medicine school is HK's only government-funded one. Visual Arts is also strong.

各专业IB要求不同：
• Communication 传播：30-33
• Business 商学：28-30
• Chinese Medicine 中医：30-32
• Visual Arts 视觉艺术：28-30
• Science 理学：26-28
• Social Sciences 社科：27-29
